sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: GDTC Forecast — Price Prediction for 2026. Should I Buy GDTC?
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed analysis and price prediction for CytoMed Therapeutics Ltd (GDTC) stock, indicating a "Strong Sell" recommendation based on negative technical signals, bearish moving average trends, and short-selling activity. Although GDTC experienced a slight increase recently, it has shown an overall decline over the past three years. The report suggests October as the month with the highest probability for positive returns based on seasonality, but generally advises caution due to several negative indicators.

feed.title: Major Angel Oak Mortgage REIT (NYSE: AOMR) holder sells 481K shares
feed.summary: A major shareholder of Angel Oak Mortgage REIT (NYSE: AOMR), Xylem Finance LLC, associated with Davidson Kempner, sold 481,537 shares of common stock at $7.87 per share on March 20, 2026. Despite this sale, Xylem Finance LLC still retains a substantial indirect holding of 3,652,673 shares. The transaction, filed as a Form 4, indicates a partial reduction by a large holder, with reporting persons disclaiming beneficial ownership beyond their pecuniary interest.

feed.title: Union Pacific Corp. Hits Day Low of $233.04 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Union Pacific Corp. experienced a significant stock decline, dropping 3.05% to an intraday low of $233.04, contrasting with the S&P 500's smaller fall. While the company has seen an 11.35% decrease over the past month, its year-to-date performance shows a modest gain. Financial analysis indicates high management efficiency but flags concerns regarding its debt-to-EBITDA ratio despite record operating cash flow.

feed.title: Analysts Remain Mixed on Caterpillar (CAT) Amid Power-Generation Equipment Agreement with Atlas Energy
feed.summary: Analyst sentiment on Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) is mixed, with about 40% holding mixed views, despite a consensus price target suggesting a 15% upside. This mixed outlook comes even as Atlas Energy agreed to purchase $840 million worth of Caterpillar power-generation equipment through 2029, covering 1.4 gigawatts of natural gas capacity. The agreement positions Caterpillar to benefit from long-cycle infrastructure investments driven by increasing U.S. electricity demand.

feed.title: Regeneron sets April 29 earnings release, webcast before open
feed.summary: Regeneron (NASDAQ: REGN) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before U.S. markets open. The company will also host a conference call and simultaneous webcast at 8:30 AM ET on the same day. A replay and transcript will be available on the company's website for at least 30 days.

feed.title: GCT Semiconductor Holding, Inc. Provides Business Update and Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
feed.summary: GCT Semiconductor Holding, Inc. reported its fourth quarter and full year 2025 financial results, highlighting significant progress in 5G chipset commercialization with over 1,900 units shipped in Q4. The company secured a licensing agreement with a major satellite communications provider and partnered with Skylo to expand global satellite connectivity for IoT devices. Despite a transitional year financially, GCT expects sequential quarterly growth in revenue and 5G chipset shipments throughout 2026, aiming for meaningful 5G revenue contribution in the latter half of the year.

feed.title: Why F5 (FFIV) Stock Is Trading Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of F5 (FFIV) rose 2.8% after the company announced two new collaborations aimed at strengthening its position in the artificial intelligence (AI) market. These partnerships include an alliance with Forcepoint for AI security across its lifecycle and expanded capabilities with NVIDIA, integrating F5's BIG-IP Next for Kubernetes with NVIDIA's BlueField-3 DPUs for performance gains. These collaborations position F5 to address critical security and performance needs in the growing AI sector, contributing to a 3.1% daily stock increase.

feed.title: Church & Dwight to Webcast Discussion of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Results on May 1
feed.summary: Church & Dwight Co., Inc. (NYSE: CHD) announced it will webcast a discussion of its first-quarter earnings results on Friday, May 1, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Investors and media can access the live audio webcast and its replay on the company's investor relations website. The company also provided details about its history and a range of personal care, household, and specialty products.

feed.title: Why Analysts Cut United Airlines (UAL) Targets Even as Demand Held Up
feed.summary: Analysts have cut price targets for United Airlines (UAL) in mid-March 2026 despite strong demand, primarily due to rising fuel costs affecting near-term earnings assumptions. Citi, Wells Fargo, and Jefferies all lowered their targets, citing increased jet fuel prices and associated risks to first and second-quarter estimates. Despite these adjustments, analysts generally maintained positive ratings on the stock, acknowledging that strong demand and the airline's premium status could mitigate longer-term impacts.

feed.title: Five Apromore employees get Salesforce stock awards after deal
feed.summary: Salesforce has granted a total of 4,268 restricted stock units (RSUs) to five non-executive employees of Apromore following its acquisition. These RSUs will vest over four years, with 25% vesting on the first anniversary and the remainder in 12 equal quarterly installments, contingent on continued employment. This action was taken under Salesforce's 2014 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan, aligning new employees' interests with company performance.

feed.title: Why Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY) Stock Is Up Today
feed.summary: Shares of Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) jumped 2.6% after the company received expanded approvals for its key cancer drug, Opdivo, broadening its market and strengthening its competitive standing. This positive development supports the long-term growth of the company's cancer drug business. The company has also seen recent positive news regarding an Alzheimer's drug candidate and participation in an AI drug discovery consortium.

feed.title: FIFTH THIRD BANCORP INVESTOR ALERT: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP Investigates Fifth Third Bancorp’s Directors and Officers for Breach of Fiduciary Duties – FITB
feed.summary: Scott+Scott Attorneys at Law LLP has initiated an investigation into Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ: FITB) concerning potential breaches of fiduciary duties by its directors and officers. This follows a lawsuit filed by institutional investors on February 26, 2026, alleging that the bank ignored and concealed subprime auto loan fraud by Tricolor Holdings. The firm is encouraging shareholders of Fifth Third Bancorp to join the investigation.

feed.title: Waters (MIL:1WAT) NonCurrent Deferred Revenue : €0 Mil (As of Dec. 2025)
feed.summary: This article reports that Waters (MIL:1WAT) has a NonCurrent Deferred Revenue of €0 Million as of December 2025. GuruFocus rates Waters with a GF Score of 26/100 and considers the stock significantly undervalued with a GF Value of €367.42 against a current price of €258.70. The report also highlights 2 warning signs for investors to review and provides historical data and comparative analysis for the company's non-current deferred revenue.

feed.title: Exxon Mobil Corporation stock faces pressure amid shifting energy transition dynamics and oil price
feed.summary: Exxon Mobil (XOM) stock is navigating a complex energy landscape, balancing traditional hydrocarbon demand with increased low-carbon investments and volatile oil prices. The company is reallocating capital to high-return projects in the Permian Basin, emphasizing free cash flow and shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks. Despite challenges like slowing global oil demand and geopolitical risks, Exxon's integrated model and focus on carbon capture technologies aim to maintain stability and appeal to US investors.

feed.title: Small Principal Financial (PFG) director trades disclosed in latest Form 4
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group director Claudio Muruzabal reported a series of small open-market trades in the company's common stock, including two purchases and one sale, as detailed in a recent Form 4 filing. These transactions, which occurred between January 2025 and February 2026, involved only 5 shares each and were executed by a financial advisor without Muruzabal's direct knowledge or instruction. Following these trades, Muruzabal directly owns 11,203 shares, and the filing clarifies that no short-swing profits requiring disgorgement under Section 16(b) were generated.

feed.title: EQT Sees Stronger Appalachian Pricing as Power, LNG Drive New Demand Wave
feed.summary: EQT Corp., the largest U.S. natural gas producer, anticipates a significant increase in demand for Appalachian gas by the end of the decade. This surge is primarily attributed to rising power demand and growing liquefied natural gas (LNG) exports, which are expected to lead to stronger pricing in the region. The article highlights the strategic importance of Appalachian gas in meeting future energy needs through both domestic power generation and international markets.

feed.title: Moderna Stock is Soaring. Is It Too Late to Buy?
feed.summary: Moderna's stock has recently surged by over 70% due to its broad pipeline of infectious disease vaccines, oncology, and rare disease candidates, following a decline in demand for its coronavirus vaccine. While the company is working towards new growth phases, including a promising cancer vaccine and a flu vaccine candidate, it reported a net loss in 2025, indicating that investors need to be patient. An analyst suggests waiting for a dip before purchasing Moderna shares, despite optimism about its future.

feed.title: AI inference costs set to plunge: Gartner
feed.summary: Gartner predicts that AI inference costs for large language model providers will drop by over 90% by 2030, driven by improved hardware and model design. However, CIOs are unlikely to see these savings passed down directly, as increasing demand for advanced functionalities like agentic AI will lead to higher token costs. Enterprises will need to balance investing in foundational AI capabilities with exploring more complex, but more expensive, frontier applications to derive value.

feed.title: CarMax to Pay $1.1 Million in Case Prosecuted by Multiple DAs, Including LA
feed.summary: CarMax has agreed to pay $1.1 million to settle a consumer protection lawsuit initiated by several district attorneys' offices in California, including Los Angeles County. The lawsuit alleged that CarMax consistently failed to timely transfer vehicle ownership documents to buyers since 2019. Under the settlement, CarMax will implement new compliance measures and pay civil penalties, investigative costs, and restitution, totaling $1.1 million, without admitting liability.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (NYSE: TPL) adds share in small insider buy
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant owner of Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE: TPL), reported a small open-market purchase of 1 share of TPL common stock at $534.94 on March 24, 2026. This transaction increased their direct holdings to 3,467,932 shares. The filing noted that this incremental buy is neutral in its impact and sentiment, and also referenced a prior stock split and beneficial ownership details.

feed.title: Six Flags takes the hint, replaces board chair
feed.summary: The article "Six Flags takes the hint, replaces board chair" reports that Cedar Point's parent company has named a new board chair. The article, published on March 25, 2026, at 01:58 PM EDT, provides this update without further details on the reasons or the new appointee. It is quite brief and appears to be more of a headline announcement.

feed.title: (FXC) Movement Within Algorithmic Entry Frameworks
feed.summary: The article discusses the algorithmic entry frameworks for Invesco Currencyshares Canadian Dollar Trust (NYSE: FXC), noting a neutral sentiment across all time horizons which suggests sideways price action. It highlights a 4.8:1 risk-reward setup, targeting a 1.4% gain with 0.3% risk, and outlines three distinct trading strategies (Position, Momentum Breakout, Risk Hedging) generated by AI models for different risk profiles. The analysis provides key support and resistance levels, emphasizing a wait-and-see approach.

feed.title: Foxx development EVP Cui Haitao sells $14941 in shares By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cui Haitao, Executive Vice President of Foxx Development Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:FOXX), sold 3,291 shares of common stock for $14,941 on March 20, 2026. Following this transaction, Cui Haitao directly holds 133,307 shares, including both vested and unvested restricted shares. Additionally, Foxx Development recently appointed Michelle Jie Shen as a new director, effective December 22, 2025, with an annual fee of $60,000.

feed.title: NASDAQ: GO: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Announces the Filing of a Securities Fraud Class Action Lawsuit Against Grocery Outlet Holding Corp.
feed.summary: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP has filed a securities fraud class action lawsuit against Grocery Outlet Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: GO) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between August 5, 2025, and March 4, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Grocery Outlet made misleading statements regarding its financial and operational growth, which was artificially supported by rapid, unsustainable store expansion, leading to missed guidance and the closure of 36 locations. Investors have until May 15, 2026, to seek lead plaintiff status.

feed.title: Enphase Energy and GRID Alternatives launch in-person battery skills initiative
feed.summary: Enphase Energy has partnered with GRID Alternatives to launch an in-person battery skills initiative in Long Beach, combining online learning with practical installation experience. This program aims to address the skills gap in the renewable energy sector and support the clean energy workforce transition. The collaboration builds on previous successful projects between the two organizations, including providing solar power to numerous households and workforce training.

feed.title: Kroger grant fuels urban farming and education in West Louisville
feed.summary: The Kroger Co. Foundation has awarded a $25,000 grant to the Louisville Urban League’s Project Kilimo, an initiative focused on urban farming in West Louisville. This program aims to teach residents how to grow their own vegetables, cook healthy meals, and develop food entrepreneurship skills, addressing food insecurity in the community. Kroger employees also volunteered 40 hours to prepare the farm for spring planting, highlighting their commitment to supporting local food access.

feed.title: Emerson Electric lists 14-acre Texas campus as it consolidates real estate portfolio
feed.summary: Emerson Electric is consolidating its real estate holdings by listing its 14-acre campus in Texas for sale. This move follows an $8 billion acquisition and mirrors a recent headquarters shift in Clayton, indicating a broader strategy to optimize its operational footprint.

feed.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TXN) announced it will hold its annual meeting of stockholders on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. An audio webcast of the meeting will be available live through the Investor Relations section of the company's website. Texas Instruments is a global semiconductor company focusing on analog and embedded processing chips.

feed.title: TD Cowen lifts PT on Devon Energy (DVN) to $50 from $46 – here’s why
feed.summary: TD Cowen has increased its price target for Devon Energy (DVN) to $50 from $46, maintaining a Buy rating. This adjustment reflects a more positive outlook on the company's future performance, particularly in anticipation of improving oil and gas prices. The firm highlights Devon Energy's compelling valuation, strong inventory, and robust free cash flow generation as key factors supporting their higher price target.

feed.title: KeyCorp stock faces renewed pressure amid shifting banking sector dynamics and deposit competition
feed.summary: KeyCorp is facing renewed pressure due to intensified deposit competition and uncertain interest rate environments, leading to compressed net interest margins and scrutiny of its loan portfolios. Regional banks like KeyCorp are struggling with deposit outflows as customers seek higher-yielding alternatives, which is impacting the bank's profitability despite its strong commercial banking franchise. Investors are closely monitoring KeyCorp's ability to navigate these challenges, particularly given its exposure to commercial real estate and the evolving regulatory landscape, while also noting its solid dividend payout and strong capital levels.

feed.title: JetBlue (JBLU) Stock Surges 15% on Acquisition Rumors Involving United and Southwest
feed.summary: JetBlue Airways (JBLU) stock surged over 15% following reports that the company is exploring a potential sale to competitors like United Airlines, Alaska Air, and Southwest Airlines. The airline has engaged advisers and conducted analyses on how antitrust regulators might view various merger combinations. Despite past financial challenges, JetBlue maintains its focus on the "JetForward" initiative, aiming for significant operating profit improvements by 2027.

feed.title: PepsiCo Inc. stock faces steady demand pressures amid consumer slowdown in North America
feed.summary: PepsiCo Inc. (ISIN: US7134481081) is experiencing steady demand pressures, particularly in North America, due to a consumer slowdown, with investors closely watching volume declines and shifting spending habits. While product innovations like Lipton Sparkling Green Tea aim to diversify its portfolio, core demand issues in its main markets persist, testing the company's resilience. US investors consider PepsiCo a defensive consumer staple, appreciating its dividend consistency and global reach despite current challenges, but need to monitor North American volume trends closely.

feed.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (TI) announced it will hold its annual meeting of stockholders on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. The meeting will be accessible via a live audio webcast through the Investor Relations section of the company's website. TI is a global semiconductor company specializing in analog and embedded processing chips.

feed.title: Texas Instruments to webcast its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (Nasdaq: TXN) will host its 2026 annual meeting of stockholders on April 16, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Central time in Dallas. An audio webcast will be available live through the Investor Relations section of the company's website, ti.com/ir, for remote attendees. This announcement ensures shareholders who cannot attend in person can still participate in the annual meeting.

feed.title: Amgen Named One of the 2026 World’s Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere
feed.summary: Amgen has been recognized by Ethisphere as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies, highlighting its commitment to integrity and ethical business practices. This award acknowledges Amgen's dedication to operating ethically while advancing science for patients. The evaluation process involves Ethisphere's Ethics Quotient® framework, assessing the company's ethics, compliance, culture, and governance.

feed.title: Senator Hawley Investigating FICO Credit Score Pricing Practices and Urging FTC to Investigate as Well
feed.summary: Senator Josh Hawley (R-MO) has initiated an investigation into Fair Isaac Corporation's (FICO) credit score pricing practices, specifically in the mortgage credit scoring market, citing significant increases in wholesale royalty fees. Hawley, acting as Chairman of the Senate Judiciary Subcommittee on Crime and a member of the Subcommittee on Antitrust, Competition Policy, and Consumer Rights, also urged the Federal Trade Commission to conduct its own investigation. He argues that these price hikes disproportionately affect first-time homebuyers and are enabled by FICO's near-monopoly, which was originally solidified by regulatory frameworks requiring FICO scores for government-sponsored enterprise transactions.

feed.title: ADP Study Highlights Job Insecurity And Implications For HR Outsourcing Demand
feed.summary: A recent ADP Research study reveals significant job insecurity globally, with only 22% of workers feeling strongly confident in their job security, despite low unemployment. This sentiment, particularly high in lower-paid, repetitive, and lower management roles, suggests a disconnect between headline labor data and actual worker feelings, likely due to concerns about AI and automation. For Automatic Data Processing (ADP), this trend could boost demand for its HR outsourcing and workforce management solutions, though potential risks include clients restructuring HR budgets or regulators imposing stricter controls on AI tools.

feed.title: Gerdau (NYSE: GGB) vice-chair exits direct preferred share stake
feed.summary: Gerdau's vice-chairman, Guilherme Chagas Gerdau Johannpeter, reported the sale of 85,607 preferred shares on March 20, 2026, at $3.29 per share, after which he no longer directly holds preferred shares. He still possesses restricted stock units that will convert into preferred shares in 2027, 2028, and 2029, and indirectly holds a significant number of common shares. The transaction was filed as an amendment to a Form 4.

feed.title: Equinix stands as the best performing large-cap real estate stock YTD (VNQ:NYSEARCA)
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) is highlighted as the best-performing large-cap real estate stock year-to-date in 2026, with a 25.89% gain. This performance stands out against a subdued S&P 500 Real Estate sector, which is down about 0.7% YTD. Other strong performers include Iron Mountain (IRM) and Digital Realty Trust (DLR), while Realty Income (O) and W.P. Carey (WPC) hold "Strong Buy" quant ratings.

feed.title: Akerna Corp stock faces ongoing challenges in cannabis tech sector amid market shifts and regulatory uncertainty
feed.summary: Akerna Corp, a provider of compliance and inventory management software for the cannabis industry, continues to face challenges due to market shifts and regulatory uncertainty, with no major new catalysts in the past 48 hours. The company's stock has underperformed, trading on OTC markets after a Nasdaq delisting, and its future hinges on potential federal reforms like cannabis rescheduling and banking access. Despite a strong platform and customer retention, Akerna must navigate intense competition and regulatory delays to achieve profitability, targeting breakeven by late 2026 if revenue accelerates.

feed.title: GROY: Peer-leading growth and free cash flow from a diversified, catalyst-rich royalty portfolio
feed.summary: Gold Royalty Corp. (GROY) boasts a diversified portfolio of over 250 royalties and streams, providing strong free cash flow and significant exposure to gold. The company is financially healthy, being net debt-free with a $150M credit facility, and is supported by a rich pipeline of catalysts and strong institutional backing.

feed.title: Booking Stock Trades at a Discount to Its Free Cash Flow Outlook
feed.summary: Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) is currently significantly undervalued, trading at a 37% discount to its intrinsic value despite strong Q4 2025 results, robust free cash flow growth, and a compelling capital return program. The article argues that market fears surrounding the Iran conflict and AI disruption are significantly mispricing the stock, creating an exceptional buying opportunity. A forthcoming 25-to-1 stock split is also expected to increase retail accessibility and further drive demand.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; A O Smith (NYSE: AOS) shows 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 17 to a Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of A O Smith Corp (NYSE: AOS) common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing confirms The Vanguard Group itself holds 0 shares after this disaggregation.

feed.title: Sherwin-Williams Co., Merck share gains lead Dow's nearly 300-point jump
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average rose by nearly 300 points, primarily driven by significant share gains from Sherwin-Williams Co. and Merck. This positive movement indicates strong performance from key component companies within the index.

feed.title: Franklin Templeton Partners With Ondo in Asset Tokenization Push
feed.summary: Franklin Templeton, a major asset manager with $1.7 trillion in AUM, has partnered with Ondo Finance to tokenize real-world assets (RWA), beginning with its ETFs. This collaboration aims to provide 24/7 trading, improved accessibility, and shorter settlement periods through Ondo Global Markets. The initiative is part of a growing trend where traditional financial institutions are leveraging blockchain technology for investment products.

feed.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering $875,000 in Uncapped Dual Directional Buffered Return Enhanced Notes, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These structured investments are linked to the least performing of the Nasdaq-100 Index, Russell 2000 Index, and S&P 500 Index, maturing on March 28, 2028. The notes are designed for investors seeking an uncapped return on appreciation or a capped return on depreciation (up to 20%).

feed.title: How Baupost’s Stake Buildup and New Coverage At Eagle Materials (EXP) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Baupost has significantly increased its stake in Eagle Materials (EXP), alongside RBC Capital Markets initiating coverage with a "Sector Perform" rating. This increased institutional interest and analyst attention are reshaping the investment narrative for Eagle Materials, focusing on its mixed heavy and light building materials portfolio and capital discipline amidst debates about potential conglomerate discounts. The article suggests investors consider varying fair value estimates and specific risks like wallboard demand and regional exposure before drawing their conclusions.

feed.title: Assessing Enova International (ENVA) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness And Strong Long Term Returns
feed.summary: Enova International (ENVA) has experienced recent share price weakness, with short-term declines, despite strong long-term returns over one, three, and five years. The company is considered undervalued by a common narrative, with a fair value of $193.71 against its current price of $137.38, driven by strong demand for digital lending and record originations. However, its P/E ratio is higher than the industry average, suggesting a mixed picture and potential risks related to regulatory changes and credit cycles.

feed.title: Ventas, Inc. Stock Hits Day Low of $81.96 Amid Price Pressure
feed.summary: Ventas, Inc. experienced a significant stock decline, reaching an intraday low of $81.96, a 6.25% drop. Despite this short-term dip and recent weekly/monthly decreases, the company has shown strong long-term performance with a 6.62% year-to-date increase and a 20.99% annual return, outperforming the S&P 500. Key financial metrics highlight robust operational performance, including 252.11% net profit growth in June.

feed.title: AT&T Inc. (T) Leads Industry Collaboration with NVIDIA and Cisco
feed.summary: AT&T Inc. (T) has announced a significant collaboration with Cisco and NVIDIA to advance AI-driven IoT, integrating edge AI compute, intelligent networking, and zero-trust security. This initiative aims to enable real-time decision-making in critical environments. Oppenheimer recently raised AT&T's price target to $32, reiterating an Outperform rating, noting the company's focus on convergence.
